DELETE /zones/{zone_id}/custom_csrs/{cus.description: Delete a custom Certificate Signing Request (CSR) and its associated private key. A CSR cannot be deleted if any custom certificates still reference it.

GET /zones/{zone_id}/custom_csrs.description: List all custom Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs) for a zone.

schema.description: Number of custom CSRs per page.

count.description: Total number of results for the requested service.

page.description: Current page within paginated list of results.

per_page.description: Number of results per page of results.

total_count.description: Total results available without any search parameters.

total_pages.description: The number of total pages in the entire result set.

common_name.description: The common name (domain) for the CSR.

key_type.description: The key algorithm used to generate the CSR.

organizational_unit.description: Organizational unit for the CSR subject.

sans.description: Subject Alternative Names included in the CSR.

POST /zones/{zone_id}/custom_csrs.description: Generate a new custom Certificate Signing Request (CSR) for a zone. Cloudflare generates and securely stores the private key associated with the CSR. The CSR can then be provided to a Certificate Authority for signing. Once signed, the certificate is uploaded via the Custom SSL endpoint using the CSR ID.

schema.description: Request body for creating a custom CSR.

common_name.description: The common name (domain) for the CSR. Must be at most 64 characters.

key_type.description: Key algorithm to use for the CSR. Defaults to rsa2048 if not specified.

sans.description: Subject Alternative Names for the CSR. At least one SAN is required. The list should include the common name.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
